title: Sequent: scale and automation for higher confidence in alignment
summary: Sequent: scale and automation for higher confidence in alignment
whyItMatters: Alignment is not on track Artificial superintelligence (ASI) may be developed in the next few years. It is unclear whether alignment is on track to be ready on the same timeframe. At a minimum, the empirical programs at AI labs are unlikely to deliver a priori confidence, before training ASI, that things will go well. We are starting a large nonprofit resea…
